Description
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext
 
recoder
This package contains some basic definitions.
recoder.kit
This package contains the RECODER transformation framework.
recoder.service
This package contains the semantical services of RECODER.

    Class
    Description
    class 
    KeYCrossReferenceNameInfo
    This is a specialisation of the NameInfo interface which allows KeY to detect multiple declaration of types.

  • Uses of NameInfo in recoder.kit

    Methods in recoder.kit that return NameInfo
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected NameInfo
    Transformation.getNameInfo()
    Returns the name info service contained in the service configuration.
    Methods in recoder.kit with parameters of type NameInfo
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static Problem
    MethodKit.checkMethodDeclaration(NameInfo ni, SourceInfo si, TypeDeclaration context, MethodDeclaration candidate)
    Query that finds out problems before inserting a new method declaration.
    static InterfaceDeclaration
    TypeKit.createAbstractSuperClass(NameInfo ni, ClassDeclaration cdecl, String abstractsupername)
    creates an abstract super class (interface) for the given class.
    static Literal
    ExpressionKit.createDefaultValue(ProgramFactory f, NameInfo ni, Type t)
    Factory method that creates the default literal to a given type.
    static DocComment
    CommentKit.createDoc(SourceInfo si, NameInfo ni, FieldDeclaration field, boolean dummy)
    Factory method creating an empty or faked comment conforming to JavaDoc conventions for the given field declaration.
    static List<Method>
    MethodKit.getAllRelatedMethods(NameInfo ni, CrossReferenceSourceInfo xrsi, ClassType type, String methodName, List<Type> signature)
     
    static List<Method>
    MethodKit.getRedefinedMethods(NameInfo ni, ClassType base, String name, List<Type> signature)
    Query returning the methods which a method in the given class with the given name and signature would redefine.
    static ClassType
    TypeKit.getSuperClass(NameInfo ni, ClassType ct)
    Query returing the super class of the given class type.
    static boolean
    MethodKit.isMain(NameInfo ni, Method m)
    Updating query that checks if the given method is a main method.
    static boolean
    MethodKit.isSerializationMethod(NameInfo ni, Method m)
    Updating query that checks if the given method is one of the serialization methods writeObject,readObject ,writeReplace,readResolve.
    static boolean
    VariableKit.isSerialVersionUID(NameInfo ni, Field f)
    Updating query that checks if the given field is a serialVersionUID constant.
    static boolean
    TypeKit.rename(ChangeHistory ch, CrossReferenceSourceInfo xr, NameInfo ni, TypeDeclaration type, String newName)
    Deprecated.
    replaced by recoder.kit.transformation.RenameType
